notes: Strategy: Extracted from https://www.suburbanpropane.com/locations-sitemap.xml (WordPress sitemap) via WebFetch. All ~560 /locations/{slug}/ URLs represent individual branch pages. Slug pattern: {city}-{state} with optional numeric suffix (e.g. 'hughesville-pa' vs 'hughesville-pa-188') for multiple branches in the same city. City/state parsed from URL slug; street addresses, ZIP, phone, and lat/lng not extracted - would require ~560 individual page fetches per branch (out of scope within time budget). Some entries are 'plant' locations (e.g. westport-plant-ny, sumter-plant-sc, simi-valley-plant-ca). Covers all geographies Suburban Propane operates in per their corporate profile (41+ states, ~700 total locations claimed).
